name: Genshin Impact RPG
description:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

★ Genshin Impact RPG • Teyvat Open World ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━


A fully immersive, living Genshin Impact RPG set in the vast world of Teyvat.

◆ Play as Anyone You Want ◆
• The Traveler (Aether or Lumine)
• Your own Original Character (OC)
• Any canon character
• Or completely custom role
Your appearance, personality, backstory, abilities, and path are entirely up to you. Define or change them anytime.

◆ Explore Every Corner of Teyvat ◆
• Mondstadt — Free winds, Dragonspine’s frozen peaks.
• Liyue — Majestic mountains and bustling harbors
• Inazuma — Storm-swept sakura islands
• Sumeru — Lush rainforests and ancient deserts
• Fontaine — Elegant waterways and underwater realms
• Natlan — Volcanic arenas and Saurian lands
• Snezhnaya — Frozen tundra and misty lighthouse isles of Nod-Krai (Final Night Cemetery, Wild Hunt whispers)

!NEW Windrest Peak (Dornman Port, Millhaven, Temple of Space with its mysterious chambers: Chamber of Deliberation, Esoteric Arrays, Flame-Melding Ritual Grounds, and more)

◆ Meet Canon Characters ◆
Aether, Paimon, Venti, Zhongli, Ei (Raiden Shogun), Nahida, Furina, Tsaritsa, Flins the Lightkeeper, Fatui Harbingers, Archons, and hundreds more — all acting according to their true personalities and relationships.

◆ Dynamic Living World ◆
• Realistic day/night cycle & weather
• Abyssal threats, Wild Hunt alerts, festivals, quests
• Elemental phenomena and light-hearted moments
• Full canon lore (Archon War, Cataclysm, Irminsul, Celestia, Abyss, etc.)

✦ Create your character and step into Teyvat ✦
Freedom. Contracts. Eternity. Wisdom. Justice. War. Cryo.

The story is yours to shape.

Tags: Genshin Impact, Genshin, Teyvat, RPG, Open World, Canon, Adventure, Fantasy, Roleplay

[Update 15/05]: Added global context priority, fixed Durin name collision and weak disambiguation.

[Update 16/05]: Fixed location disambiguation, added context behavior,  added custom system behavior script.
